trait.name: Magic Suppression Field
entries: Enemy creatures within 10 feet of the Null-Blade Enforcer cannot teleport by magical means and make concentration saves with disadvantage.

trait.name: Adaptive Shielding
entries: When the Null-Blade Enforcer takes damage from a spell, it can gain resistance to that damage type until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Null-Blade Enforcer makes two Null-Greatsword attacks.

action.name: Null-Greatsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) force damage.

action.name: Void Pulse Slam (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 13 ({@damage 3d8}) force damage and becoming stunned until the end of its next turn on a failed save, or taking half as much damage on a successful one.

bonus.name: Surge Step
entries: The Null-Blade Enforcer moves up to 15 feet without provoking opportunity attacks.
